scenario: Test Case 2 - Paris sessions and languages

selectedOption.name: Bateaux Parisiens – Paris Essentiel Early Dinner Cruise

content.name: Bateaux Parisiens – Paris Essentiel Early Dinner Cruise

included.description: An all-inclusive menu with a choice of à-la-carte dishes (set menu for 15 persons or more) - starter, main dish, dessert, wines, mineral waters, coffee and authentic, tasty cuisine cooked on-board by the Chef.

excluded.description: Any additional expenses which are not included or detailed in the programme.

importantInfo: Formal dress required: jeans and sport shoes are not allowed.  No flip flops, t-shirts or shorts.
We recommend you wear smart clothing and shoes.

comments.description: Printed Voucher. Print and bring the voucher to enjoy the activity.

content.description:
With a clear and vivid commentary accompanied by music evoking the various places and times, broadcast through an individual headset, you are sure to observe the magnificent bridges of Paris. See the Pont Neuf, incongruously named the New Bridge but now actually the oldest bridge in Paris.


Reach the centre point of Paris as you pass Cité Island, which, along with Saint-Louis island, is a naturally formed island situated in the river, and on which the impressive Notre-Dame Cathedral sits. Go westwards passing in front of the Louvre Museum to reach the Eiffel Tower.


An all-inclusive à la carte menu of starter, main course, dessert, wines, mineral water and coffee is offered on-board. The authentic and savoury cuisine is skilfully prepared on board for your delight.


Ticket Options:

- Etoile

Midship location

cocktail as an aperitif

Starter + main dish + dessert to choose

1 bottle of red wine or 1 bottle of white wine for 4 people


- Privilege

Window location

cocktail as an aperitif

Starter + main course + dessert to choose

1 bottle of red wine or 1 bottle of white wine for 4 people


- Premier

Location at the bow of the ship

Glass of champagne as an aperitif and dessert

Starter + main course + dessert to choose

Selection of fine wines. 1 bottle of white wine for 4 people
content.summary: Let yourself be swept away by the magic of Paris around a delicious dinner on this romantic cruise. Discover the beautiful bridges and monuments of Paris while enjoying traditional French cuisine aboard a trimaran. Entirely glass fitted, with a terrace behind and gangways all round, the boat affords an excellent vantage point from which to view Paris’s many sights.

raw.name: Bateaux Parisiens – Paris Essentiel Early Dinner Cruise

options.name: Madame Brasserie Restaurant - Dinner at the Eiffel Tower

content.name: Madame Brasserie Restaurant - Dinner at the Eiffel Tower
importantInfo: Please make sure you answer all the mandatory questions during the booking process.
content.description:
Enjoy a unique moment at the top of Paris with this culinary experience at Madame Brasserie on the first floor of the Eiffel Tower.


Sit in the centre of the Madame Brasserie restaurant and have the option to choose from an early or late dinner option (to select at time of booking). Take the lift to the first floor of the Eiffel Tower where you will be served healthy and gourmet cuisine in a friendly atmosphere.


Experience world-class service in a restaurant with stunning views of Paris. Discover the dishes of the committed artisan, Thierry Marx, who shares his human and environmental values with this establishment by proposing a menu prepared with local and seasonal products.


Gustave Menu

Starter + main course + dessert


Ticket options

With drinks (champagne, wine, and coffee) at 6:30 pm or 9 pm

(you have to respect the time selected at the moment of the reservation, it's not a choice on spot)


Scan the provided QR code at reception to enjoy a digital Mystery Game about Madame Brasserie and the Eiffel Tower.


Note:

For group bookings (more than 10 people), the choice of a unique menu is imposed (except for allergies and dietary restrictions). Please contact us to set up the Menu with the restaurant.


Important information – There may be restrictions

Due to the Summer Olympics held in Paris, please be aware that the service may be affected on some days. The Olympics will take place between 26 July and 11 August 2024, and the Paralympic Games between 28 August and 8 September 2024. The Prefecture of Paris regularly provides information on the accessibility of Parisian sites, so be sure to check before planning your experience and getting to the meeting point on the day of your service.

raw.name: Madame Brasserie Restaurant - Dinner at the Eiffel Tower

options.name: Le Diamant Bleu - Gourmet Dinner Cruise on the Seine River

content.name: Le Diamant Bleu - Gourmet Dinner Cruise on the Seine River
importantInfo: Please make sure you answer all the mandatory questions during the booking process.
content.description:
Looking for a dinner cruise in Paris? Come on board the Diamant Bleu for our dinner cruise.


During our 2.5-hour cruise discover Paris by night and enjoy our chef's refined cuisine including fresh and “gourmand” products, all prepared on board, and enjoy the most beautiful avenue of the world: the Seine River.


Enjoy as well our wide rooftop of 400m2 where you will take multiple selfies near the Eiffel Tower glittering at night.


Once on board, enjoy a live musical performance thanks to our singer and end your evening on the dancefloor with our DJ Set.


Options:

• Gourmet Dinner includes entry, main dish, dessert, and 1/2 bottle of water per person

• VIP Gourmet Dinner includes entry, main dish, dessert, and 1/2 bottle of water per person. It also guarantees a placement near the window and a panoramic view.

• Sparkling Gourmet Dinner includes entry, main dish, dessert, and 1/2 bottle of water, 1/2 bottle of champagne/wine per person.

• VIP Sparkling Gourmet Dinner includes entry, main dish, dessert, and 1/2 bottle of water, 1/2 bottle of champagne/wine per person, and also a placement near the window and a panoramic view.

raw.name: Le Diamant Bleu - Gourmet Dinner Cruise on the Seine River

options.name: Food cruise with Bateaux Mouches

content.name: Food cruise with Bateaux Mouches
content.description:
Glide along the river and view the City of Light from a different perspective. Take your seat, sit back and relax as you admire the iconic sights of the city pass you by. Large windows give you maximum views as you are served up a three course meal.


A three hour evening cruise gives you all the refinement Paris deserves. Illuminated monuments provide a breathtaking backdrop as a three course dinner complete with aperitif and choice of wine is yours to enjoy. Choose either the Excellence or Prestige menu and make the most of this fabulous city by night.


Or you can opt for a 1 hour 45 minutes lunch cruise for a more relaxed way to spend the afternoon. Admire all the main sights in the light of day and create memories with your family and friends. Both cruises also feature live music to accompany your culinary experience in Paris.


Why not try the new sunset cruise, for a lazy late-afternoon dinner? With the perfect lighting and beautiful views, this will definitely be your favourite way of seeing the city whilst enjoying the delicious food. Watch the rush of the end of the day from the comfort of the boat as we leisurely sail the Seine.


Lunch Cruise

Including: Appetizer, Starter, Main Course, Cheese Course or Dessert, ½ bottle of wine per person, water or soft drink.


Dinner Cruise

Prestige: Aperitif and appetizer, Starter, Main, Cheese Course and Dessert, Coffee or Tea, ½ bottle of wine per person, water or soft drink.


Excellence: Aperitif and Appetizer, Starter, Main, Cheese Course and Dessert, Coffee or Tea and Cognac, ½ bottle of wine per person, water or soft drink.


Start/opening time:

Lunch cruise: 12:30pm. (Boarding starts 30 minutes prior to departure).

Early Dinner Cruise: 6pm. (Boarding starts 30 minutes prior to departure).

Late Dinner Cruise: 8:30pm. (Boarding opens between 7:45pm and 8:10pm).

Special Dinner Cruise: 9pm (Boarding at 8:30pm).


Duration:

Lunch Cruise: 1 hour 45 minutes

Early Dinner Cruise: 1 hour 15 minutes

Late Dinner Cruise: 2 hour 15 minutes

Special Dinner Cruise: 1 hour 45 minutes


Special occasions

Valentines Day Dinner Cruise - A cruise on the Seine lasting 2 hours and 15 minutes, a menu specially created by our Chef Cuisinier, accompanied by romantic live music: all the elements come together to offer our clients a romantic evening to remember.

Bastille Day - 14th July - Enjoy a unique view of the Eiffel Tower Fireworks at 11pm.


Bastille Day Menu - 14th July

Appetiser

Hors d'oeuvres and Kir Royal

Starter

Duck Foie Gras with crispy cocoa, black cherry chutney and onion confit

or

Creamed beetroot, lobster tail with a smoked olive vinaigrette

Main Course

Lamb shank served with a herb crumble, pepper mousse and aromatic sauce

or

Scallops served with a sweet potato risotto and creamed seaweed

Cheese

Selection of three seasonal french cheeses

Dessert

Pistacho shortbread served with red berries


Drinks

﻿Tea or coffee

Glass of Cognac

Bottle of Moët & Chandon Champagne (for 2 people)

1/2 bottle of mineral or sparkling water


Languages

French, Spanish and English.


Important information:

The lunch and dinner cruises include seats near to plate glass windows, an open upper deck with a smoking area and a cloakroom. Music entertainment will be an accordonist at lunch, lounge music for the early dinner cruise and a Violonist and a Pianist for the dinner cruise.
content.summary: Cruise along the River Seine and take in the sights of Paris as you tuck into a sophisticated dinner or lunch.
highligths: Choose between a lunch, sunset and dinner cruise
See the city from a different perspective
Live music to compliment your three course meal
Livemuziek ter aanvulling op uw driegangendiner
Kies tussen een lunch-, zonsondergangs- of dinercruise
Ontdek de stad vanuit een ander perspectief

raw.name: Food cruise with Bateaux Mouches

options.name: Trattoria en Seine -Italian Dinner Cruise in Paris

content.name: Trattoria en Seine -Italian Dinner Cruise in Paris
importantInfo: Please make sure you answer all the mandatory questions during the booking process.
content.description:
Embark on a unique adventure in the heart of Paris with La Trattoria en Seine, a cruise that combines refined Italian cuisine with the unrivalled charm of the City of Light. On our intimate boat, you'll enjoy an experience that's both gourmet and panoramic, all to a spellbinding musical accompaniment.


Let yourself be gently carried by the waters of the Seine while admiring the most beautiful monuments of Paris. Don't miss the unforgettable spectacle of the glittering Eiffel Tower at 10pm and 11pm.


Immerse yourself in the enchanting atmosphere of our cruise with soft Italian music playing in the background, instantly transporting you to the culture and charm of Italy. Enjoy this chic and intimate cruise with friends, family or even as a couple.


Savour a delicious Italian meal or lunch, prepared by our kitchen brigade using fresh pasta and top-quality ingredients. With a selection of four courses to choose from, each more delicious than the last, your taste buds and desires are sure to be satisfied.


The dinner cruise option includes entry, main dish, desert & 1/2 bottle of water per person. 

The VIP option guarantees also a placement near the window and a panoramic view.

The Formula Trattoria Spritz option includes entry, main dish, desert & 1/2 bottle of water per person and an Aperol Spritz  


Important information:

Depending on the modality chosed


1st service:

Boarding: from 5.30pm

Cruise departs: 18:00

Return to quay: 20:00

2nd service:

Boarding: from 21:00

Cruise departs: 21:30

Return to quay: 23:30


Book your spot now and get ready for this amazing experience!

raw.name: Trattoria en Seine -Italian Dinner Cruise in Paris

options.name: Madame Brasserie Restaurant - Lunch at the Eiffel Tower

content.name: Madame Brasserie Restaurant - Lunch at the Eiffel Tower
importantInfo: Please make sure you answer all the mandatory questions during the booking process.
content.description:
Enjoy a unique lunch experience above the Paris rooftops in the heart of France’s most famous landmark, the Eiffel Tower. Sample French cuisine by Parisian chef Thierry Marx.


Get a taste of the high life in the famous Madame Brasserie restaurant on the first floor of the Eiffel Tower. Savor a delicious lunch prepared by artisan chef Thierry Marx and enjoy stunning views over the city and inside the iconic tower itself.


Ascend skywards in the lift to the first floor of the Eiffel Tower and step into the contemporary yet cozy atmosphere of the Madame Brasserie restaurant. Indulge in a three-course lunch, consisting of a starter, main course, and dessert, made from locally sourced and seasonal products.


Menu Madame

Starter + main course + dessert

Choose whether to accompany the delectable bites with drinks including champagne, wine, filtered water, and coffee.


For some added fun, scan the QR code at the reception to enjoy a digital mystery game or to access exclusive content about Madame Brasserie and the Eiffel Tower.


Note:

For group bookings (more than 10 people), the choice of a unique menu is imposed (except for allergies and dietary restrictions). Please contact us to set up the Menu with the restaurant.

raw.name: Madame Brasserie Restaurant - Lunch at the Eiffel Tower

options.name: Bateaux Mouches - Sightseeing Cruises Across the Capital

content.name: Bateaux Mouches - Sightseeing Cruises Across the Capital
importantInfo: Remember to bring the voucher and valid photo ID with you
content.description:
The Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, Notre Dame, the Conciergerie, the Musée d’Orsay … These monuments, forming the true richness of Paris’ heritage, are absolute must-sees on a sightseeing holiday.

Seeing Paris by boat gives you a different perspective, enabling you to take in the historic heart of the capital in a new way, from a different angle. We invite you to hop on board one of its 6 passenger boats for a fantastic commentated trip down the Seine. Boat tours depart daily, running in both the daytime and evening. This service includes a commentated boat tour of the historical monuments dotted along the route: The Eiffel Tower, Notre Dame Cathedral, the Conciergerie, the Musée d’Orsay, and much more.

Languages
Audio guide in French, English, German, Spanish, Italian, Korean, Chinese, Japanese, Russian, and Portuguese.

Others
The Route Map is offered and available in 25 languages.

raw.name: Bateaux Mouches - Sightseeing Cruises Across the Capital

options.name: Bustronome Gastronomic Dinner Experience - Under the stars

content.name: Bustronome Gastronomic Dinner Experience - Under the stars
content.description:
An innovative concept to combine an exclusive sightseeing tour and fine French cuisine. Experience an original gourmet way to discover Paris under the stars!


The Bustronome is a Parisian invitation to rediscover some of the City of Light's most beautiful locations while enjoying fine French cuisine. This singular journey combines a visual experience with a treat for the taste buds; Paris residents and tourists alike can indulge their love of culture while savoring good food.

Aboard a double-decker bus converted into a restaurant, guests will enjoy a friendly welcome and a wide variety of dishes in a fashionable setting. Enjoy a contemporary menu that changes with the seasons featuring aspects of world cuisine, but still decidedly French. Its gourmet chef demonstrates that technique, local products, aesthetics, and tradition can all blend harmoniously to create the perfect meal. Whether you are lunching, snacking, or dining, every itinerary is a voyage of discovery, where the variety of sights and the harmony of flavors all come together to delight the guests.


Enjoy a city tour on a deluxe double-decker bus with a panoramic glassed roof and a gastronomic 6-course meal with optional drinks


Important information – There may be restrictions 

As the city prepares for the Olympic Games 2024, our route to iconic monuments may be adjusted accordingly without previous notification. We’ll make sure to give you the best itinerary during your gastronomic experience on board.

raw.name: Bustronome Gastronomic Dinner Experience - Under the stars

options.name: Discover Paris - Private Walking Tour

content.name: Discover Paris - Private Walking Tour
importantInfo: As this tour involves a fair amount of walking, please wear comfortable shoes.
Please make sure you answer all the mandatory questions during the booking process.
content.description:
If you want to get to know Paris in the most comfortable and personal way, with a guide at your complete disposal, come with us to discover the most interesting corners of the city.
The guide will make an itinerary based on your tastes and preferences.

We will discover Paris quietly, with time to take photos, buy souvenirs and have lunch in a restaurant of your choice. It will be a unique tour in which our guide will also tell you details and curiosities about local Parisian life.

In our standard itinerary we will see the most important monuments and attractions of Paris: Notre Dame Cathedral, Latin Quarter, Seine River, Pont Neuf, Pont des Arts, Louvre Museum pyramid, Opéra Garnier, Tuileries Garden, Champs Elysées, Arc de Triomphe, Pont Alexandre III, Eiffel Tower, Île de la Cité, Place Vendôme, Montmartre, Sacré-Coeur Basilica, Moulin Rouge...

raw.name: Discover Paris - Private Walking Tour

options.name: Crazy Horse Cabaret Show

content.name: Crazy Horse Cabaret Show
content.description:
Discover the legacy of this must-see show, which has been driving all who have visited this legendary venue “Totally Crazy”, ever since it opened its doors in 1951.

Sit back as the world´s most sensual dancers, legendary acts and stunning visual and lighting effects captivate and entice you into the world of Crazy Horse.

Admire in awe as the breath-takingly beautiful and classically trained dancers take to the stage with their risqué costumes and Louboutin’s, to present a 90-minute unique and dazzling performance unlike any other. Be charmed by the selection of must-see performances and magnificent acts created by Philippe Decouflé, Christian Louboutin, Chantal Thomass, Stéphane Lucas and Dita Von Teese & Ali Mahdavi.

Enjoy an unforgettable night that you would be totally crazy to miss!

Options

Crazy Premium:
Show + ½ bottle of La Cuvée Crazy Champagne and an assortment of 5 canapés per person
Crazy Champagne:
Show + ½ bottle of La Cuvée Crazy Champagne
Crazy Show:
Show only
Crazy New Year:
- At 7:45pm and 10:15pm: Show + 1/2 bottle of Veuve Clicquot Champagne or 2 drinks per person, Pertrossian Caviar (12g), an assortment of canapes and 2 Ladurée macarons.
- At 1am: Show 1/2 bottle of Moët & Chandon Champagne or 2 drinks per person and 2 Ladurée macarons.
content.summary: Immerse yourself in the creative and sophisticated world of Crazy Horse Paris with the "Totally Crazy" show
highligths: Stunning visual effects, lighting, and choreography
Named the sexiest cabaret in the world
Choose how you wish enjoy the authentic Parisian cabaret
Verbluffende visuele effecten, verlichting en choreografie
Kies hoe u wilt genieten van de authentieke Parijse cabaret
Genoemd naar de meest sensuele cabaret ter wereld

raw.name: Crazy Horse Cabaret Show

options.name: Paris at Night - Walking Tour

content.name: Paris at Night - Walking Tour
content.description:
This tour is a very good introduction to seeing the main monuments of this amazing city. The tour guide begins with an explanation in Opera Garnier, one of the most characteristic buildings in Paris. We will continue through Madeleine Church (a reproduction of the Olympian Zeus Temple, of Athens), Place de la Concorde (the second largest in France), the Champs Elysées and the Elysee Palace, the residence of the President. Also, know the beautiful stories hidden behind the National Palace of the Invalids, where are the remains of Napoleon, among others. The walk ends at the Eiffel Tower, the symbol of Paris par excellence.


What you will learn about on this tour:

In honour of which woman was the Eiffel Tower built.

Which building inspired the well-known work "The Phantom of the Opera?

What was the first tea room in Paris? - What does "particular hotel" mean in old french?

Why was the place of Industry replaced by the Grand Palais and the Petit Palais?

What was the purpose of the Esplanade of the Invalides originally?

What is the "most beautiful avenue in the world"?

What did Charles de Gaulle prefer to live in "Les Invalides" and not in the Elysee Palace? -Who was Bella Otero?

What happened from January to March 1910 on the Seine?

What is the more luxurious and expensive district to live in Paris? Do not think about it! And discover the essentials monuments of "the city o love" and the stories that surround them.


If you select the Tour + Seine River Cruise option, you will have the opportunity to relish in a picturesque and leisurely river cruise along the stunning Seine. This delightful cruise can be enjoyed either following your captivating night walking tour or on the following day, at your convenience. Additionally, the cruise ticket boasts a generous validity period of 2 years, providing ample time to take advantage of this memorable experience.

raw.name: Paris at Night - Walking Tour

options.name: Versailles Palace and Gardens - Private Tour

content.name: Versailles Palace and Gardens - Private Tour
importantInfo: Please make sure you answer all the mandatory questions during the booking process.</br> Tour times may change based on ticket availability.</br> This tour includes tickets to see the Musical Fountain Show on the days that they're available. When the show is not on, your guide will take you on a walking tour through the Gardens.
content.description:
Explore the golden splendour of the Palace of Versailles and its formal gardens on this half-day trip from Paris. The golden palace of the Sun King, Louis XIV, is France’s most visited attraction and a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This fantastic tour of Versailles will introduce you to the glory and tragedy of one of the largest royal palaces in the world.


On your private tour of Versailles, you will:

• Travel in comfort with private return transportation from central Paris;

• Learn about the French monarchy and the run-up to the Revolution;

• Hear the story of Louis XIV, France's longest reigning monarch: the Sun King, and his dream of the Palace of Versailles;

• Admire the golden gates and the impressive Baroque architecture;

• See the chapel where the unlucky King Louis XVI and Queen Marie Antoinette were married;

• Hear about the daily routines of the palace royals, nobles and servants and the royal ablutions and the duties of the King's gentlemen;

• Learn the intricacies and scandals of life at court, how to hold your fan, drop your gaze, bow and curtsy;

• Discover the mandate dubbed the 'Versailles Shuffle' and hear about Louis XIV's love of the ballet;

• See the best of the palace, including the Royal Chapel, the magnificent Hall of Mirrors, Peace Room, War Room, and the King’s Grand Apartments;

• Enjoy the formal grandeur and beauty of the Gardens of Versailles;

• On select days when running, enjoy the magical charm of the Musical Fountains shown in the garden;

• After a tour of the famous gardens, enjoy an easy, private transfer back to Paris.

 

Explore this supreme symbol of royal power, the Palace of Versailles, with your expert private guide. Learn about the history of the French monarchy, and the story of how the young King Louis XIV turned a humble hunting lodge into the golden, gilded Baroque masterpiece of a palace you see today.

 

Walk the halls that kings, queens, nobles, dignitaries and servants of ages past have walked, admiring the extensive art collection including the King Louis XIV bust by Bernini, and enjoy the exquisite furniture and Baroque atmosphere of this most grandiose of palaces.

 

Admire the reflections in the Hall of Mirrors - an innovative design for the time, and learn about courtly soirees and etiquette, as well as the scandals, plots and power struggles that dominated life amongst the French nobility.

 

You will discover the most famous parts of the Palace, such as Versailles' Royal Chapel, the Hall of Mirrors, and the King's Grand Apartments, where you'll learn all about Royal ablutions, and what daily life was like in this most luxurious of palaces.


After exploring the decadent interior, relax and take in the majestic beauty of the formal Gardens at Versailles – the grandest example of classical French landscaping anywhere in France, strewn with many beautiful statues and colossal fountains. On select days, enjoy the Musical Fountains show, which incorporates sound into the beauty of the garden.


Generally, the show runs from April through October, on weekends and some Tuesdays and Fridays. On days when the show is not on, your guide will take you on a walking tour through the Gardens, after which you will return to Paris via private transportation.


Important information

This tour includes the use of mandatory headsets for groups of 5 or more.

raw.name: Versailles Palace and Gardens - Private Tour

options.name: Parc Astérix Full-Day Entrance Ticket

modalities.name: 1 day Futé ticket - Early sale - Low season
1 day Futé ticket - Early sale - Low season

content.name: Parc Astérix Full-Day Entrance Ticket
content.description:
Enjoy a memorable day out with all your favorite characters from the Gaul village just 22 miles (35 kilometers) from Paris. Discover 6 themed zones, and more than 50 different attractions and shows with new sensations and excitement at every turn. Go on your very own odyssey to the lands of the Romans, Gauls, Greeks, Vikings, and Egyptians.

Then climb aboard Toutatis, France's fastest ride, and feel the excitement as you speed through the air at 110km/h and soar 51 meters high! If that's not enough, loop and spin your way through the exhilarating Oziris, where twists and turns will leave you breathless.

For those seeking even more thrills, let yourself be carried away by the legendary Tonnerre 2 Zeus. This iconic wooden rollercoaster is as mythical as it is impressive, offering a ride that you won't soon forget.

For a family adventure, climb aboard Pegasus Express or let yourself be seduced by the hypnotic experience of Chez Gyrofolix. The little Gauls have not been forgotten: they can have fun in the Idéfix Forest, an area specially designed for them, with attractions adapted from the world of Obelix's little companion.


For show lovers, there's ‘C'est du Délire’, the first Gallic musical featuring Groupidupianix and Sérotonine. Don't miss ‘Les Plongeons de l'Olympe’, where fearless divers perform impressive acrobatics. And of course, experience the Gaulish Parade with iconic Asterix characters in a warm, musical atmosphere.


The Gauls are pulling out all the stops with new attractions to make the Romans jealous! Head to Cétautomatix, the new family attraction, to try out the craziest chariots in Gaul.


Gaulish summer, from 12 July to 30 August 2025

Open until 10pm every evening.

A tailor-made adventure to make the most of a typically Gallic summer: challenges for young and old, attractions to suit all tastes, entertainment... You're guaranteed to make a splash this eventful season with Pirate's Revenge - Grand Splatch!


Gaulish Christmas, 20 December to 4 January 2026

Imagine snow-covered menhirs, frosty decorations, and joyful Christmas music filling the air. Enjoy Obelix's Slide, a thrilling winter sport, and explore Santa's Wonderful Gardens, a magical trail of lights leading through the Enchanted Wood, Ice Valley, and Santa's Village. Meet the Gaulish Father Christmas, catch the Christmas shows, and visit the Christmas market for winter food. Don't miss the grand Gallic Christmas parade and the final show, ‘L'île aux vœux’.


Schedule

Prior to your visit, please check the opening hours here.


Important information

For safety reasons, access to some of the attractions is subject to minimum and/or maximum size restrictions.

Tickets do not include entry to special events or to “Peur sur le Parc” Halloween night-time openings (7pm to 1am) for which a special ticket must be purchased.
content.summary: One small corner of Paris still holds out against the invading hordes – and your friends Asterix and Obelix are leading the resistance. Spend the day at the Parc Astérix and hop on a Roman roller coaster, log flume for the ride of your life, or go on an Astérix odyssey to ancient lands. Enjoy attractions and have a fun time for all.
highligths: New for 2025: the Cétautomatix family attraction will have you whirling!
Experience the newest attractions, including Toutatis
Plunge into a world of adventure with Asterix and Obelix
Enjoy more than 50 sensational attractions and shows at Parc Astérix

raw.name: Parc Astérix Full-Day Entrance Ticket

options.name: Paris Je T'aime Highlights - Half-Day Private Walking Tour

content.name: Paris Je T'aime Highlights - Half-Day Private Walking Tour
importantInfo: Please wear comfortable shoes.  Dress according to the weather and bring camera & sunscreen.</br> Hat</br> Please bring a bottle of water.
content.description:
During this fabulous four-hour walking tour of Paris, you will explore the most interesting and diverse central neighbourhoods the French capital has to offer. See the sights at your own pace and adapt your tour with your guide, who will be happy to offer suggestions based on your preferences.

On your private half-day highlights tour, you will:

-Visit the historical heart of Paris, Île de la Cité;
-Walk by the Sainte-Chapelle and the Conciergerie, the former Parisian prison;
-Explore the wonderful haunts of the Latin Quarter, just a short walk away;
-Learn about Paris' home of intellectual thought and see where the May '68 revolution unfolded;
-Visit the Tuileries Gardens, the Place de la Concorde and the Champs-Élysées;
-Walk around the surroundings of the symbolic Notre-Dame de Paris Cathedral;
-End your walking tour at the stunning Pont Alexander III bridge.

Explore Île de la Cité, one of the two remaining natural islands in the Seine River, considered the historic heart of Paris.

The medieval city of Paris was refounded here with the magnificent Sainte-Chapelle and the former prison, the Conciergerie. While on Île de la Cité, you will have time to walk around the hauntingly beautiful Notre Dame de Paris Cathedral.

The Latin Quarter along the Left Bank was so named because, until the French Revolution, university students in the area spoke only Latin to their professors.

You will visit this famed neighbourhood to immerse yourself in the Parisian atmosphere of yesteryear, whilst exploring the medieval streets and meandering through fantastic shops like Shakespeare and Company bookshop, Place Saint-Michel, and its gorgeous fountain.

As the tour continues, you will learn little-known facts about the French Revolution. You will be exploring the beautiful Tuileries Gardens and the Place de la Concorde, the site at which Louis XVI was beheaded during the French Revolution. Whilst here, do not forget to look out for the magnificent Champs-Élysées, the most famous shopping avenue in the world.

Lastly, you will stop off at the Pont Alexander III, the most beautiful bridge in Paris, where you can enjoy a splendid view of the Eiffel Tower and beyond the majestic Seine. J’aime Paris.

raw.name: Paris Je T'aime Highlights - Half-Day Private Walking Tour

options.name: Explore Bohemian Montmartre - Half-Day Private Walking Tour

content.name: Explore Bohemian Montmartre - Half-Day Private Walking Tour
content.description:
Uncover the history and art of Montmartre, and explore this quintessentially bohemian neighbourhood in Paris on this private walking tour with your professional tour guide.On this tour, you will:


• Discover Bohemian Montmartre, the home of world-renowned artists, including Picasso and Renoir.

• See the Sacré-Coeur (external only), Van Gogh’s former home, and the city's last vineyard.

• See the home of the Moulin Rouge.

• Experience some of the best panoramic views of Paris from the top of the hill.￼

• Enjoy a tasty local treat from a French pâtisserie!

In this fascinating walking tour of Montmartre, you will be immersed in Paris' most bohemian and intriguing neighbourhood, whilst exploring this unique enclave of the city. You will see first-hand where some of the world’s most influential painters including Renoir, Picasso and Van Gogh, lived and worked on this beautiful hill towering above Paris.

You will also have the pleasure of discovering the windmills and many monuments that make this area famous. A highlight undoubtedly will be paying a visit to the famous Moulin Rouge, as well as traversing the highest point in Paris at the gleaming white Sacré-Cœur Basilica.

Built in the 19th century in the wake of the Franco-Prussian War and the chaotic Paris Commune, the Sacré-Cœur emerged to become a symbol of the struggle between the conservative Catholic establishment and the secular republic radicals.

Your expert city guide will explain the complex history of Montmartre, a place of devout worship spanning from the Druids of ancient Gaul right up to today.

Make sure you have your camera as you are sure to be rewarded with a spectacular picture-perfect view of Paris below.

raw.name: Explore Bohemian Montmartre - Half-Day Private Walking Tour

options.name: Grevin Wax Museum - Ticket

content.name: Grevin Wax Museum - Ticket
content.description:
Plunge into the iconic scenes of yesterday and today with your favourite celebrities at a modernised, refurbished and immersive Grévin! Explore our different spaces and discover some of our leading personalities such as Messi, Mbappé, Al Pacino, Penelope Cruz, Leonardo DiCaprio, Scarlett Johansson, Charlie Chaplin, Omar Sy, they are all there! The Museum is pleased to welcome its latest characters: Mick Jagger, Lang Lang, Katy Perry and Ranveer Singh.

At Grévin Paris, you are the VIP! A unique venue in central Paris where the cameras are flashing for you, protect your eyes and strike a pose! Rub shoulders with the men and women who shape our world at a museum visit unlike any you have ever experienced!

Grévin Paris is more than just a visit, it's an experience!

raw.name: Grevin Wax Museum - Ticket

options.name: Vintage Side-Car Tour of Paris - Great Escape Small Group Tour

content.name: Vintage Side-Car Tour of Paris - Great Escape Small Group Tour
importantInfo: Please ensure you answer all the mandatory questions during the booking process.
content.description:
This tour will blow your mind away and allow you to enjoy the charm of the capital. This is the perfect formula to fully enjoy Paris. Find all the experience of our Gentlemen Siders through this circuit. Take your time, let yourself be guided. 


Anecdotes, a wink at the history of the city, share unusual places off the beaten track.


You can choose between 3 themes:


Bohemian Paris - Undertake an exploration of Montmartre, her cobbled streets, Sacré Coeur, the Place du Tertre and its caricaturists, the last vineyard in the city.


The Ile de la Cité - Dive into the very historical heart of Paris, past Notre Dame, the Conciergerie, the Place Dauphine, the Sainte-Chapelle, the famous flower market.


The Latin Quarter - Disappear into the cradle of learning and culture of Paris, the Sorbonne and the campus of Jussieu but also medieval Paris: the Roman amphitheater of Lutetia, the Cluny Museum.


Your gentleman sidercarist will meet at the place of your choice if it is within the vicinity of Paris intra-muros (District 1st to 17 - except in district 12).

raw.name: Vintage Side-Car Tour of Paris - Great Escape Small Group Tour

options.name: The Musée d'Orsay Highlights: Half-Day Private Tour

content.name: The Musée d'Orsay Highlights: Half-Day Private Tour
importantInfo: Please note that flash photography is not permitted. Please note that flash photography is not permitted.
Please make sure you answer all the mandatory questions during the booking process, otherwise we cannot guarantee the correct provision of the service.</br>
content.description:
The Louvre may be the most visited museum in Paris, but the Orsay is probably the most enjoyable. Housed in the Gare d’Orsay, and constructed by Victor Laloux for the 1900 World Fair, the Orsay Museum is one of Paris’ most beloved museums, devoted to a huge breadth of art between 1848 and 1914.

During the tour, your expert guide will help you navigate this huge collection to land you in front of the world-famous pieces housed in the museum. You will see numerous works by Monet, Renoir, Cézanne, Gauguin, and Van Gogh while learning how each generation of artists has influenced the next.

Explore the most iconic artworks in the world, including Vincent van Gogh’s ‘Starry Night over the Rhone, Renoir’s ‘Bal du Moulin de la Galette’, and Cézanne’s 'Card Players', and learn from your knowledgeable guide, about the stories behind these artworks and their creators along the way.

After your guided tour, feel free to further explore the vast museum and its beautiful work at your own pace.
content.summary: Escape the bustle and step into the Golden Age of art in the Musée d’Orsay to enjoy one of the world’s greatest collections of Impressionist and Post-Impressionist art.
highligths: Explore the highlights of the museum, focusing on the best work of the Impressionists
See Van Gogh’s Starry Night, Degas’ Ballerina, Manet’s Luncheon on the Grass, and one of Monet’s Waterlily pieces
Find yourself in front of an other-worldly clock, with stunning vistas over Paris
See the model for the Opera Garnier, designed by Carpeaux
Stand in front of Thomas Couture Les Romains de la Décadence – the museum’s largest painting
Ontdek de hoogtepunten van het museum, met de nadruk op het beste werk van de impressionisten.
Staat oog in oog met een andere-wereldse klok, met adembenemende uitzichten over Parijs
Bekijk het model van de Opera Garnier, ontworpen door Carpeaux
Sta voor Thomas Coutures Les Romains de la Décadence – het grootste schilderij van het museum
Bezoek Van Goghs 'Sterrennacht', Degas' 'Ballerina', Manets 'Luncheon on the Grass' en een van Monets 'Waterlelies'.

raw.name: The Musée d'Orsay Highlights: Half-Day Private Tour

options.name: Immersive Audio Walks Paris

content.name: Immersive Audio Walks Paris
content.description:
Complement your tours with self-guided immersive audio-walks. We bring travellers the perfect companion in the city of lights to embark on self-guided, movie- like journeys. We take travellers to discover the [redacted]s of Paris with 3D sound effects and characters brought to life by actors performing directly to travellers´ headsets. Our audio walks help travellers experience Paris like never before. Exploring the most iconic places has never been this fun and easy. Learn the stories behind the great Eiffel Tower as you walk around champs de mars, Trocadero and the Eiffel tower surroundings. We also take travellers to discover the bohemian neighbourhood of Montmartre and the artists that have immortalized it today.

Discover the history of the emblematic Sacre Coeur, Place du Tertre, Espace Montmartre, The Atelier of Picasso, Cinema Studio 28, The Maison Van Gogh, Champs de Mars, The Eiffel Tower, Jena Bridge and the Trocadero Park.

How does it work?
To discover Paris like never before, don't forget to do download the app on your smart device here.
Select Paris, and activate your tour by introducing the code that appears on your voucher, and wait for your audiotour to begin!
What's more, with access to all the available audio walks in Paris, interactive GPS maps, and more, your sightseeing experience just got a lot more easier!

raw.name: Immersive Audio Walks Paris

options.name: Vintage Side-Car Tour of Paris - Classic Small Group Tour

content.name: Vintage Side-Car Tour of Paris - Classic Small Group Tour
importantInfo: Please ensure you answer all the mandatory questions during the booking process.
content.description:
Discover the very essence of Paris on an unusual sidecar adventure.


Ready to experience Paris differently? Hop on a sidecar and let your gentleman sider guide you on a fascinating adventure through the City of Light. This tour takesyou on an unforgettable journey, where you'll discover the iconic monuments, historic districts and panoramic views for which Paris is known the world over. Anauthentic tour through the must-see places, but also the discovery of those that only true Parisians know.We meet at the church of Saint Germain des Prés, in the intellectual and artistic heart of Paris. Climb aboard your sidecar and let yourself be carried away by therhythm of the Parisian streets. You'll be accompanied by enthusiastic local guides, full of stories to share. Every alley, every square, every building hides an anecdotethat will plunge you into the city's [redacted] history.You can choose your own itinerary, for an even more personalized adventure!


Île de la Cité, Notre-Dame and Arènes de Lutèce


Your journey begins on the Île de la Cité, the historic birthplace of Paris, where you'll discover the impressive Notre-Dame de Paris, a masterpiece of Gothicarchitecture. Then, let yourself be surprised by the Lutetia Arena, a fascinating and little-known site. This 2000-year-old Roman arena plunges you into Paris' ancientpast, far from the tourist crowds.After this plunge into history, you'll pass through the Latin Quarter, with its picturesque lanes, cafés and bookshops. You'll pass through charming historic sitesbefore returning to Saint-Germain-des-Prés.


The piers of the Seine, the Eiffel Tower and the Trocadéro.


If you prefer a more romantic route, opt for a stroll along the quays of the Seine. Follow the river and marvel at the city's historic bridges, with breathtaking views ofthe iconic buildings lining the banks. Your destination? The majestic Eiffel Tower, the undisputed symbol of Paris. Stop for a memorable photo under its imposingshadow before heading back to Saint-Germain-des-Prés.


What's more, each stop is transformed into a guided mini-tour. Let yourself be carried away by the charm of each neighborhood and the stories told by your Parisiandriver, who will reveal unexpected anecdotes about the culture, history and people of Paris. This isn't just a stroll, it's a real immersion in the soul of Paris.
highligths: Explore Paris by retro motorbike sidecar
Hear entertaining anecdotes about the "City of Light"
See attractions such as the Eiffel Tower, Latin Quarter or Île de la Cité

raw.name: Vintage Side-Car Tour of Paris - Classic Small Group Tour
